mapper.select:
SELECT zone_idx, zone_code, zone_name, DSC as DCS, USE_YN FROM TB_ZONE WHERE 1=1
AND zone_name like CONCAT('%',#{zone_name},'%')
AND use_yn = #{use_yn}
order by ZONE_IDX ASC

select ti.zone_code, ti.FAC_CODE, fc.FAC_NAME, fc.DSC as DCS, group_concat(ti.tagname) AS tagname, ti.USE_YN from TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_FAC fc WHERE ti.FAC_CODE = fc.FAC_CODE
AND zone_code like CONCAT('%',#{zone_code},'%')
AND fc.FAC_NAME like CONCAT('%',#{fac_name},'%')
AND ti.tagname like CONCAT('%',#{tagname},'%')
and ti.zone_code is not null GROUP BY ti.FAC_CODE
SELECT RATE_IDX, LARGE_CTGRY, MIDDLE_CTGRY, SMALL_CTGRY FROM TB_RT_MSTR_INF WHERE USE_YN = '1'
SELECT * FROM TB_RT_RATE_INF WHERE RATE_IDX = #{rate_idx} AND SSN = #{ssn} GROUP BY STN_TM
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_TAGINFO set zone_code = #{zone_code}, USE_YN = #{USE_YN} where fac_code = #{FAC_CODE}
UPDATE TB_FAC set DSC = #{DCS}, fac_name = #{FAC_NAME} where fac_code = #{FAC_CODE}
mapper.select: SELECT YEAR(rdh.ts) AS year, MONTH(rdh.ts) AS month, sum(ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE,2)) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG AND pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND pti.MNTR_YN='1' and DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y') = DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{year},'-01-01'),'%Y') GROUP BY YEAR(rdh.ts), MONTH(rdh.ts) ORDER BY YEAR(rdh.ts), MONTH(rdh.ts)
SELECT * FROM TB_GOALSETTING WHERE YEAR = #{year}

SELECT year, 1m,2m,3m,4m,5m,6m,7m,8m,9m,10m,11m,12m FROM TB_GOALSETTING b WHERE TYPE = 'mm' UNION ALL ( SELECT base, IFNULL(max(1m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 1m, IFNULL(max(2m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 2m, IFNULL(max(3m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 3m, IFNULL(max(4m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 4m, IFNULL(max(5m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 5m, IFNULL(max(6m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 6m, IFNULL(max(7m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 7m, IFNULL(max(8m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 8m, IFNULL(max(9m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 9m, IFNULL(max(10m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 10m, IFNULL(max(11m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 11m, IFNULL(max(12m), CONVERT(0, UNSIGNED)) as 12m FROM ( (SELECT 'base' FROM DUAL) target, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 1m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-01-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-02-01 00:00:00') ) a, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 2m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-02-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-03-01 00:00:00') ) b, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 3m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-03-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-04-01 00:00:00') ) c, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 4m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-04-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-05-01 00:00:00') ) d, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 5m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-05-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-06-01 00:00:00') ) e, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 6m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-06-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-07-01 00:00:00') ) f, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 7m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-07-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-08-01 00:00:00') ) g, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 8m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-08-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-09-01 00:00:00') ) h, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 9m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-09-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-10-01 00:00:00') ) i, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 10m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-10-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-11-01 00:00:00') ) j, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 11m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-11-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-12-01 00:00:00') ) k, (SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS 12m FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-12-01 00:00:00') and rdh.ts <= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-12-31 23:59:59') ) l ) ) ORDER BY YEAR desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PTR_STRTG_INF ( TAG, VALUE, RGSTR_TIME, UPDT_TIME, REAL_TIME_YN, SSN_ID, SSN ) VALUES ( #{no}, #{value}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), '1', #{ssn_id}, #{ssn} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE TAG = #{no}, VALUE = #{value}, UPDT_TIME = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), REAL_TIME_YN = '1', SSN_ID = #{ssn_id}, SSN = #{ssn}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_OPER_INF WHERE SSN=#{ssn}

SELECT PUMP_IDX, CONCAT(PUMP_GRP_DSC,PUMP_GRP_IDX) 'PUMP', PUMP_NM, PUMP_GRP_NM, PUMP_GRP_DSC, PUMP_GRP_IDX, ANLY_RNK , USER_RNK , PMS_USE_YN, USE_YN, PRRT_RNK, PUMP_CTR_TYP FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF ORDER BY PUMP_GRP ASC
mapper.update: update TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF set PRRT_RNK = #{PRRT_RNK}, PMS_USE_YN = #{PMS_USE_YN}, USER_RNK = #{USER_RNK}, PUMP_CTR_TYP = #{PUMP_CTR_TYP} where PUMP_IDX = #{PUMP_IDX}
mapper.select:
select a.range, a.TIMEZONE, SUM(a.value) as value FROM ( SELECT round(rdh.value * pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE, 2) AS value, rdh.ts, rdh.tagname,
'dayAgo' AS 'range',
'day' AS 'range',
'month' AS 'range',
'year' AS 'range',
rri.TIMEZONE as 'timezone' FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_RT_RATE_INF rri, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG AND pti.IS_ALL = '1' AND DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts, '%H') = rri.STN_TM and rri.RATE_IDX ='1' and rri.MNTH = DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts, '%m')
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND CONCAT(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), ' 23:59:59')
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(#{date})
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-01-01 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-12-31 23:59:59')
) a GROUP BY a.TIMEZONE

select.if: SELECT IFNULL(savingKwh, 0) as 'savingKwh', IFNULL(savingCo2, 0) as 'savingCo2', 'dayAgo' AS 'range' FROM TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET WHERE date = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
SELECT IFNULL(savingKwh, 0) as 'savingKwh', IFNULL(savingCo2, 0) as 'savingCo2', 'day' AS 'range' FROM TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET WHERE date = #{date}

SELECT IFNULL(sum(CAST(replace(savingKwh,',','') AS DECIMAL(10,1))), 0) as 'savingKwh', IFNULL(sum(CAST(replace(savingCo2,',','') AS DECIMAL(10,1))), 0) as 'savingCo2', 'month' AS 'range' FROM TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET WHERE DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m')

SELECT IFNULL(sum(CAST(replace(savingKwh,',','') AS DECIMAL(10,1))), 0) as 'savingKwh', IFNULL(sum(CAST(replace(savingCo2,',','') AS DECIMAL(10,1))), 0) as 'savingCo2', 'dayAgo' AS 'range' FROM TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET WHERE DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y')

mapper.select:
select ms.zone_idx, ms.zone_code, ms.type, IFNULL(SUM(ms.value), 0) as value from ( select DATE_FORMAT(rdhi.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS ts, ti.zone_code, zn.zone_idx, ROUND(rdhi.value*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE, 2) AS 'value', 'kwh_dayAgo' as type 'kwh_day' as type 'kwh_month' as type 'kwh_year' as type FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdhi, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_ZONE zn WHERE rdhi.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG AND pti.PWQ_TAG = ti.tagname AND ti.USE_YN='1' AND zn.ZONE_CODE = ti.zone_code AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1'
AND rdhi.ts BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND CONCAT(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), ' 23:59:59')
AND rdhi.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
AND rdhi.ts BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(#{date})
AND rdhi.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-01-01 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(YEAR(#{date}), '-12-31 23:59:59')
) ms GROUP BY ms.zone_code order by ms.zone_idx ASC

sql.if: AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
AND rdh.ts > LAST_DAY(#{date}) - interval 1 month AND rdh.ts <= LAST_DAY(#{date})

mapper.select:
SELECT
'day' AS 'range',
'month' AS 'range',
cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM,
COALESCE((COUNT(CASE WHEN rdh.VALUE = 1 THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(rdh.VALUE), 0)) * 100, 0) as ctr_rate FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh WHERE rdh.tagname = cppi.PMB_TAG
COALESCE( ( SELECT ROUND(SUM(rdh.VALUE * pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE), 2) as pump_kwh FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = cppi.PWQ_TAG and pti.PWQ_TAG = cppi.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and rdh.value is not null AND rdh.value > 0
GROUP BY cppi.PUMP_IDX ), 0) AS pump_kwh FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE cppi.USE_YN = '1'
COALESCE(SUM(value * 0.000001), 0) as frq_value FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh WHERE rdh.tagname = cppi.FRQ_TAG
AND cppi.USE_YN = '1' GROUP BY cppi.PUMP_IDX;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts, rdh.tagname, tgi.TNK_GRP_IDX, tgi.TNK_IDX, tgi.TNK_GRP_NM, tgi.TNK_NM, ROUND(SUM(rdh.value)/COUNT(rdh.value), 4) AS avg_value, ROUND(MIN(rdh.value), 4) AS min_value, ROUND(MAX(rdh.value), 4) AS max_value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_TNK_GRP_INF tgi WHERE tgi.LEI_TAG = rdh.tagname AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59') AND tgi.TNK_TYP='1' AND tgi.USE_YN='1'
GROUP BY rdh.tagname ORDER BY tgi.TNK_GRP_IDX, TNK_NM

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts, rdh.tagname, tgi.TNK_GRP_IDX, tgi.TNK_IDX, tgi.TNK_GRP_NM, ROUND(SUM(rdh.value)/COUNT(rdh.value), 4) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_TNK_GRP_INF tgi WHERE tgi.LEI_TAG = rdh.tagname AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59') AND tgi.TNK_TYP='2' AND tgi.USE_YN='1'
GROUP BY tgi.TNK_GRP_NM, DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')

SELECT A.ts, A.value AS USE_PWR, A.value * 0.98 as PRDCT_PWR, A.value * 1.02 as GNRTD_PWR, (select value from TB_PTR_CTR_INF where tag in (select tag from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where func_typ='targetPeakElec') ) AS GOAL_PEAK FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS ts, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59') AND rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_tag AND pti.is_all = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and rdh.value > 0 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ) A

SELECT ROUND(MAX(rdh.VALUE)*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE,2) as peak FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG AND pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND pti.MNTR_YN='1' and rdh.value>0 and ts >= CONCAT(#{date},' 00:00:00') AND ts <= CONCAT(#{date},' 23:59:00')
mapper.insert: update TB_PTR_CTR_INF set value = #{peakValue} where tag = (select TAG from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE func_typ = 'selectPeakGoal')
mapper.select: select value from TB_PTR_CTR_INF where tag = (select TAG from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE func_typ = 'selectPeakGoal')
SELECT MNTH, SSN FROM TB_RT_RATE_INF WHERE RATE_IDX = '1' GROUP BY MNTH ORDER BY CONVERT(MNTH, SIGNED) ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RT_RATE_INF SET SSN = #{ssn} WHERE MNTH = #{month} AND RATE_IDX = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT TIMEZONE, BASE_RATE, ELCTR_RATE FROM TB_RT_RATE_INF WHERE RATE_IDX = '1' AND SSN = #{ssn} GROUP BY TIMEZONE
SELECT SSN, STN_TM, TIMEZONE FROM TB_RT_RATE_INF WHERE SSN = #{ssn} AND RATE_IDX = '1' GROUP BY STN_TM ORDER BY CONVERT(STN_TM, SIGNED) ASC

SELECT PUMP_IDX, CONCAT(PUMP_GRP_DSC,PUMP_GRP_IDX) 'PUMP', PUMP_NM, PUMP_GRP, PUMP_GRP_NM, PUMP_GRP_DSC, PUMP_GRP_IDX, ANLY_RNK , USER_RNK , PMS_USE_YN, USE_YN, PRRT_RNK, PUMP_CTR_TYP FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{pumpGrp}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(TS), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS <= NOW() AND TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), interval 1 week) ORDER BY TS;
SELECT AVG(VALUE) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = #{tag} AND TS <= #{ts} AND TS >= DATE_SUB(#{ts}, interval 1 hour);
SELECT AVG(VALUE) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = #{tag} AND TS <= #{ts} AND TS >= DATE_SUB(#{ts}, interval 1 Day);
